creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2010-12-15 23:37:33 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/rubygem-vmail   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Vmail is a Vim interface to Gmail.
  
  Why vmail? Because some people love using Vim 1000 times more than
  using a web browser or a GUI mail program.
  
  Author: danchoi <dhchoi@gmail.com>
  
  WWW: http://danielchoi.com/software/vmail.html
  
  PR:             ports/153169
  Submitted by:   Hsin-Han You <hhyou at cs.nctu.edu.tw>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1046    +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/mail/rubygem-vmail/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/mail/rubygem-vmail/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/mail/rubygem-vmail/pkg-descr (new)
